summary: Comprehensive testing of Manual Inventory Movement Entry feature (Iteration 61). All 19 backend tests passed for POST /api/inventory-ledger/movements endpoint. Frontend verified: MovementFormDialog shows only 5 manual types (opening_balance, manual_adjustment, transfer, writeoff, correction). Blocked types (order_commitment, order_release, receipt) correctly excluded. Form submission works with idempotency key, success toast shown, movement appears in table with source_type=manual_entry.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/movements — writeoff with positive qty → 422
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history — manual entries appear with source_type=manual_entry
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/history/summary — totals include manual entries
Backend: derive_balances — on_hand correct after manual_adjustment + correction + writeoff (1000+200-50-100=1050)
Frontend: Navigate to Inventory Ledger page loads correctly
Frontend: Select Hormel Foods workspace shows workspace view
Frontend: Click Movements tab shows movement table
Frontend: Click '+ Movement' button (data-testid='inv-new-movement-btn') opens dialog
Frontend: Movement Type dropdown shows ONLY 5 manual types
Frontend: Dropdown excludes blocked types (order_commitment, order_release, receipt)
Frontend: Form submission with item='TEST-UI-MANUAL-123', qty=456 succeeds
Frontend: Success toast 'Movement recorded' appears after submit
Frontend: New movement visible in table with source='manual entry'
Frontend: Summary strip updates (Items: 7→8, On Hand: 2160→2616)
critical_code_review_comments: MANUAL_ALLOWED_TYPES correctly limits to: opening_balance, manual_adjustment, transfer, writeoff, correction
MANUAL_BLOCKED_TYPES correctly rejects: order_commitment, order_release, receipt with 422
Zero qty validation: body.qty == 0 returns 422 'Quantity must not be zero'
Writeoff validation: qty > 0 returns 422 'Writeoff must reduce inventory'
Duplicate opening_balance check uses customer_id + item + warehouse + ownership_type composite key
Idempotency: checks idempotency_key in MOVEMENTS_COLL before creating, returns 409 on match
Frontend MANUAL_MOVEMENT_TYPES array correctly includes only 5 allowed types
seed_data_used: Backend tests create unique workspace TEST_Manual_Movement_XXXXXX with warn_only policy. Each test creates unique items with uuid suffix (TEST_ADJ_POS_*, TEST_CORR_*, TEST_WO_*, etc.). Workspace deactivated on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual movement entry feature fully tested. Key endpoint: POST /api/inventory-ledger/movements with ManualMovementReq model {customer_id, movement_type, item, qty, item_description, warehouse, ownership_type, unit_of_measure, reference, notes, idempotency_key}. Only allows opening_balance/manual_adjustment/transfer/writeoff/correction. Rejects order_commitment/order_release/receipt with 422. Zero qty rejected 422. Writeoff must be negative. Duplicate opening_balance for same item/warehouse/ownership returns 409. Idempotency key duplicate returns 409. Frontend button data-testid='inv-new-movement-btn'. Dialog shows MANUAL_MOVEMENT_TYPES array with 5 options. Frontend generates idempotency key on submit.
